citation.description: pyproject.toml line 10: version = "0.10.1"; server.json line 5 (top-level) and line 15 (packages[0]) both show "version": "0.10.1" — exactly 2 occurrences.

criteria.criterion: Version-lockstep holds: 'grep -c 0.10.1 pyproject.toml' >=1 and 'grep -c 0.10.1 server.json' == 2 (top-level + the single packages[] entry) on the release commit.

citation.description: Line 11: '## [0.10.1] - 2026-07-24' with curated Added/Changed/Fixed/Ops subsections following.

criteria.criterion: CHANGELOG.md carries a curated release section: 'grep -E "^## \[0\.10\.1\]" CHANGELOG.md' matches.

citation.description: The plan-review signature on the ticket records head_sha=cffbe72fc3fe3b94c636f97e98791eea6fd9e4c5 and merged_log_commit=cffbe72fc3fe3b94c636f97e98791eea6fd9e4c5, confirming the release commit is on origin/main. The repo files (pyproject.toml v0.10.1, server.json v0.10.1 x2, CHANGELOG [0.10.1]) are consistent with this SHA being HEAD. Ticket comment attests Gerrit change 952 MERGED with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, naming the specific change number and merged SHA.

criteria.criterion: Release commit landed on main through Gerrit with both gate votes green: LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 and status MERGED, and 'git log origin/main --oneline | grep -i "release 0.10.1"' finds it.

citation.description: Ticket comment (final attestation): 'AC4 PyPI: curl pypi.org/pypi/nava-rebar/json -> info.version == 0.10.1.' Also cites release.yml run 30065382823 with publish job success and pypi deployment approval granted by JoeOakhartNava. Concrete specifics: version value 0.10.1, workflow run ID 30065382823, named approver.

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] 0.10.1 published to PyPI: curl pypi.org/pypi/nava-rebar/json -> info.version == 0.10.1.

citation.description: Ticket comment (final attestation): 'AC5 GitHub Release v0.10.1: target=cffbe72 (=origin/main HEAD), draft=false prerelease=false, /releases/latest -> v0.10.1.' Concrete specifics: tag name v0.10.1, target commit SHA cffbe72, isLatest confirmed, draft=false prerelease=false.

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] v0.10.1 tag + GitHub Release created at the released main SHA: 'gh release view v0.10.1 --json tagName,targetCommitish,isLatest' shows the tag, marked Latest.
